title: March 19
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|March}}

'''March 19''' is the 78th day of the year (79th in leap years). There are 287 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Dermot Crowley]] is born.
*[[1950s#1957|1957]] – [[Iain McCaig]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Kevin Shinick]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 108|''Star Wars Weekly'' 108]] published.
*[[1985]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Vehicles and Vessels]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – [[Republic 51|''Republic'' 51]] published.
*[[2004]] – [[Star Wars Insider 75|''Star Wars Insider'' 75]] is released for subscribers.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: Complete Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: The Ultimate Visual Guide: Special Edition]]'' published.
*[[2009]] – [[Star Wars Insider 108|''Star Wars Insider'' 108]] published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Invitation Only]]'' webcomic published on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2010]] – "[[Senate Murders]]" airs in the United States on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2014]] – [[Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows 4|''Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows'' 4]] released.
*2014 – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force War 5|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force War'' 5]] released.
*[[2018]] – [[David Bischoff]] dies.
*2018 – "[[Hasty Departure]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Unexpected Company]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Shuttle Shock]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Jyn's Trade]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Run Rey Run]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Bounty Hunted]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[The Path Ahead]]" airs on YouTube.
*2018 – "[[Porg Problems]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Choose Your Destiny: An Obi-Wan & Anakin Adventure]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Ewoks — Flight to Danger]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars by Jason Aaron Omnibus]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[Bill Hargreaves]] dies.
*2024 – ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 1]]'' reprinted.
*[[2025]] – Episodes 12 - 23 of ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures|Young Jedi Adventures]]'' [[Young Jedi Adventures Season Two|Season Two]] premiered on [[Disney+]].
*2025 – "[[Nubs and RJ Jam Out]]" released on [[StarWarsKids.com]].
*2025 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 16|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 16]] published.
<noinclude>
